data.title: Franklin Templeton XRP ETF Hits 63M Holdings in Week
data.description:
Franklin Templeton XRP ETF holdings reached 63 million tokens in one week, valued at $127. 8 million on NYSE Arca.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/franklin-templeton-xrp-etf-63m-holdings-week

data.title: Bitcoin Enters Post-QT Era as New Cycle Signals Form and Downside Risk Shrinks
data.description:
Bitcoin is entering a decisive macro moment as the three-year stretch of Quantitative Tightening (QT) officially ended on December 1, 2025. Historically, this environment has pressured both Bitcoin and altcoins, but market behavior often shifts quickly once QT concludes.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-enters-post-qt-era-as-new-cycle-signals-form-and-downside-risk-shrinks/

data.title: Perplexity AI hit with copyright violation lawsuit
data.description:
The New York Times (NYT) and Chicago Tribune have filed lawsuits against Perplexity AI, accusing the AI startup of copying and distributing their copyrighted content without permission to power its generative AI systems. In what is setting up to be the latest high-stakes showdown between legacy journalism and artificial intelligence technology, The New York Times […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/perplexity-ai-copyright-violation-lawsuit/

data.title: Cango Inc Ranks 16th Among Public Companies Holding Bitcoin
data.description: According to Odaily, Cango Inc (CANG) currently holds 7,033 BTC, placing it 16th among publicly listed companies with Bitcoin holdings. The company's market capitalization stands at $208.45 million.

data.title: BitMine Leads Ethereum Accumulation as DAT Buying Slows Sharply
data.description:
Ethereum’s largest on-chain treasuries are shifting their behavior. Monthly acquisitions across most DATs have fallen by a steep 81% since the August peak, signaling a cooling period after months of aggressive buying.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitmine-leads-ethereum-accumulation-as-dat-buying-slows-sharply/

data.title: DEX Perp Volume Ripped Past $1 Trillion for Second Month as Spot Traders Quietly Fled to CEX
data.description:
Key Insights On-chain trading volume across spot and perpetual markets totaled $1. 71 trillion in November 2025, according to the latest blockchain news data. The figure represented an 11% decline from October, which had registered an all-time high for combined on-chain volume
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/12/06/dex-perp-volume-ripped-past-1-trillion-for-second-month-as-spot-traders-quietly-fled-to-cex/

data.title: Why CFTC-approved spot Bitcoin, Ethereum trading is a 'massively huge deal'
data.description:
Gold has popped 4,000% following CFTC's approval in the 1970s, leaving Bitcoin and Ethereum with a similar scaling setup.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/why-cftc-approved-spot-crypto-trading-is-big-deal-for-bitcoin-ethereum?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: ChatGPT is losing the AI race to Gemini
data.description:
ChatGPT’s rapid expansion is showing signs of cooling, while Google’s Gemini picks up speed, new research by Sensor Tower shows. ChatGPT still holds the top spot in the AI assistant space. Data from Sensor Tower shows that OpenAI captures half of all worldwide mobile downloads and accounts for 55% of people using AI chatbots each […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/chatgpt-is-losing-the-ai-race-to-gemini/

data.title: Eight Companies Increase Bitcoin Holdings Among Top 100 Firms
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Bitcoin Treasuries.NET reported on platform X that eight of the world's top 100 publicly listed companies holding Bitcoin have increased their holdings over the past seven days. Data reveals that these 100 companies collectively possess 1,059,453 BTC.
